titleStmt.title: SII 15.34: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 34. (B.K. No. 177 of 1928-29.) TEGGI, BADAMI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the temple of Māruti.

This is dated the 10th regnal year of the king, Prabhava, Āshāḍha śu. amāvāsyā Monday. The date corresponds to 1147 A.D., June 29, the weekday being Sunday. The expression śu. is obviously a scribal error.
It registers a gift of land made by Kāṭi-gāvuṇḍa of Ādaṇḍagi in Hunugunda Thirty to the god Kalidēva of the place. The gift was entrusted into the hands of Gaṅgaṇavve.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ sa
tyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cā
ḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmajajja jagadē
kamalladēvara vijayarājya
muttarōttarābhivriddiprava
¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁ
baraṁ saluttamire 10 neya
prabhava saṁvatsarada Aṣāḍa su
ddha Amāvāse sōmavāradaṁ
ndu �
baḷiya Ādaṁḍigaya kāṭa
gāvuṇḍaṁ tammūra śrīkali
dēva¨rgge gaṁgaṇaveya kā
laṁ ka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rvvakamā
gi yavasūra dāriyiṁ pa
ḍuvalu biṭṭakeyi hiri
kōla matta māṟu Oṁdu
ya nivēsaṇa dēgula
ke dhāreya ku
viṁtī dha¨rmmamaṁ pratipālisu
varu yidanaḷidaṁ kōṭi kavi
leyaṁ brāhmaṇaraṁ tapōdhana
ranaḷida phātaka © © ©
